hero.title: Turning Rwanda's Oldest Savings Tradition Into a Credit Superpower
hero.description: 5.9 million Rwandans save together in community groups every week — but their records live in notebooks. IkiminaPass digitizes group management, automates MoMo contributions, and generates a verified Credit Passport score from 0 to 850.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.subtitle: A team that grew up with ikimina
who_we_are.description: IkiminaPass was founded by Rwandans who watched their families and communities rely on ikimina groups for decades. We know this tradition from the inside — the trust it requires, the discipline it builds, and the vulnerability it creates when that trust is broken.
who_we_are.team_description: We are a fintech team combining deep local knowledge with modern technology — built to serve people who need it most, not just those who already have access.

problem_solution.subtitle: Years of savings discipline — invisible to banks
problem_solution.description: Rwanda's ikimina groups are a powerful savings engine. But when a member walks into a bank asking for a loan, their years of weekly contributions count for nothing — no verifiable record, no credit history, no proof.
solution_points: Digital ledger every member can verify in real time
MoMo automation removes human handling of funds
Credit Passport score built from real transaction data
Banks and SACCOs can now lend with confidence
Dispute resolution system for fair conflict handling

credit_passport.title: Credit Passport
credit_passport.subtitle: Your savings history, finally visible to banks
credit_passport.description: After just 3 months of consistent contributions, IkiminaPass generates a verified Credit Passport score from 0 to 850 — calculated directly from your real MoMo transaction records. Share it with any bank, SACCO, or MFI to access formal loans at fair rates.

momo_payments.desc: Contributions are collected and confirmed via MTN MoMo automatically — no chasing, no disputes.

credit_score.title: Credit Passport Score
credit_score.desc: After 3 months, every member earns a verified score from 0 to 850 backed by real transaction history.

fund_protection.title: Fund Protection
fund_protection.desc: No more treasurers disappearing with group funds. Every franc is tracked, recorded, and accountable.

trust.title: Why Trust Us
trust.subtitle: Trust is built into how the platform works
trust.description: We don't ask you to trust us — we built the platform so you don't have to take our word for it. Every safeguard is structural, not just a promise.

no_cash_handling.title: No cash ever touches a treasurer
no_cash_handling.desc: All contributions flow directly through MTN MoMo — from member to group account. No human intermediary handles the money.

every_member_sees.title: Every member sees every transaction
every_member_sees.desc: The group ledger is fully visible to all members in real time. No record can be altered without every member knowing.

immutable_records.title: Immutable MoMo-backed records
immutable_records.desc: Every transaction is timestamped and stored permanently. Records cannot be deleted or edited after confirmation.

treasurers_rewarded.title: Treasurers are rewarded for honesty
treasurers_rewarded.desc: We pay treasurers 35% of transaction fees. Accuracy and integrity are financially incentivized — not just expected.

about.title: About IkiminaPass
about.subtitle: Making Rwanda's informal savings visible, secure, and financially powerful.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.heading: Turn Rwanda's savings discipline into a recognized financial identity
mission.desc_1: We believe that every Rwandan who has contributed faithfully to an ikimina group for months or years deserves to have that discipline recognized by the formal financial system. IkiminaPass exists to bridge that gap — using technology to make the invisible visible, the informal verifiable, and the excluded included.
mission.desc_2: Our mission is not just to build software. It is to fundamentally change who gets access to credit in Rwanda — by proving that savings behavior, not bank account history, is the truest measure of financial trustworthiness.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.heading: A team that grew up with ikimina
who_we_are.desc_1: IkiminaPass was founded by Rwandans who watched their families, neighbors, and communities rely on ikimina groups for decades. We know this tradition from the inside — the trust it requires, the discipline it builds, and the vulnerability it creates when that trust is broken.
who_we_are.desc_2: We are a fintech team combining deep local knowledge with modern technology. Our backgrounds span financial services, mobile money infrastructure, and community development. We built IkiminaPass because we believe technology should serve the people who need it most — not just those who already have access.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.heading: What we are trying to solve
problem.desc: Rwanda's ikimina system is one of the most powerful grassroots financial tools in the world. But it has four critical failures that IkiminaPass was built to fix:

0.title: Funds disappear with treasurers
0.desc: In traditional ikimina groups, the treasurer holds all the money. When they disappear — and it happens — members lose everything with no legal recourse.

1.title: No verifiable credit history
1.desc: Years of faithful weekly contributions mean nothing to a bank. There is no formal record, no proof, no credit identity — so members are locked out of formal loans.

2.title: Loan sharks fill the gap
2.desc: With no access to formal credit, members turn to informal financial institutions charging 10% per month or more. A short-term emergency becomes a long-term debt trap.

3.title: Records are fragile and manipulable
3.desc: Notebooks get lost, Excel files get corrupted, and records can be altered. There is no audit trail, no accountability, and no way to resolve disputes fairly.

solution.title: Our Answer
solution.heading: IkiminaPass solves all four
points: MoMo automation means no treasurer ever holds cash
Immutable digital ledger creates a verifiable credit history
Credit Passport score gives members access to formal loans at fair rates
Transparent records and dispute resolution eliminate manipulation

trust.title: Why Trust Us
trust.heading: Why IkiminaPass is trustworthy
trust.desc: Trust is not something we ask for — it is something we earn through how the platform is built. Here is exactly why members, treasurers, and financial institutions can rely on IkiminaPass:

reasons.0: No Cash Ever Touches a Treasurer
reasons.0_desc: All contributions flow directly through MTN MoMo — from member to the group account. No human intermediary handles the money, eliminating the single biggest source of fraud in traditional ikimina groups.
reasons.1_desc: The group ledger is visible to all members in real time. Every contribution, every payout, every balance — fully transparent. No treasurer can alter records without every member knowing.
reasons.2_desc: Every MoMo transaction is timestamped and stored permanently. Records cannot be deleted or edited after confirmation — giving members a tamper-proof history they can rely on.
reasons.3: Credit Scores Backed by Real Data
reasons.3_desc: Our Credit Passport scores are not estimates or guesses. They are calculated directly from verified MoMo transaction records — the same data banks and regulators can audit.

story.title: Our Story
story.heading: Why we built IkiminaPass
story.desc_1: We saw the same story repeat itself too many times: a group member contributes faithfully for two years, then needs a loan to expand their business or handle a medical emergency. They walk into a bank. The bank asks for credit history. They have none — at least none the bank can see. They leave empty-handed and turn to a loan shark at 10% per month.
story.desc_2: Meanwhile, their ikimina treasurer has a notebook with two years of perfect payment records. That notebook is worth nothing to a bank. We built IkiminaPass to change that — to make those records count, to make that discipline visible, and to give every faithful saver the financial identity they have already earned.

0.title: Community First
0.desc: We built IkiminaPass to serve the millions of Rwandans who already save together — not to replace their tradition, but to protect and amplify it.

1.title: Financial Inclusion
1.desc: Our goal is to make formal credit accessible to every Rwandan who has demonstrated savings discipline — regardless of whether they have a bank account.

2.title: Radical Transparency
2.desc: Every transaction is visible to every member. No hidden fees, no opaque processes. Trust is built by making everything open and verifiable.

edge.title: Our Edge
edge.heading: We reward treasurers instead of charging them
edge.desc: Most platforms charge treasurers a fee to use their software. We do the opposite. IkiminaPass shares 35% of every transaction fee collected with the treasurer — creating a self-sustaining adoption engine across Rwanda where honesty and accuracy are financially rewarded.

how_it_works.title: How IkiminaPass Works
how_it_works.subtitle: From weekly community savings to verified loan-readiness — a simple, fully digital journey.

steps.title: Group Registers on IkiminaPass
steps.desc: A treasurer creates a group account, sets the contribution amount, frequency, and invites members.

steps.title: Members Join and Confirm
steps.desc: Each member receives an SMS or USSD prompt to confirm their participation.

steps.title: Contributions Collected via MTN MoMo
steps.desc: On contribution day, members receive an automated MoMo payment request.

steps.title: Every Transaction Recorded Automatically
steps.desc: Each payment is timestamped, confirmed, and stored in an immutable digital ledger.

steps.title: Rotation Payout Managed Digitally
steps.desc: When it's a member's turn to receive the pot, the payout is sent automatically via MoMo.

steps.title: Credit Passport Score Generated
steps.desc: After 3 months of consistent contributions, IkiminaPass generates a verified Credit Passport score.

steps.title: Member Shares Score with Financial Institution
steps.desc: The member authorizes a bank, SACCO, or MFI to access their Credit Passport report.

steps.title: Financial Institution Offers Fair Formal Loan
steps.desc: With verified credit data, financial institution can offer a formal loan at fair rates.

access_methods.title: Works for every Rwandan — smartphone or feature phone

smartphone.title: Smartphone App
smartphone.desc: Full dashboard for treasurers and members.

ussd.title: USSD (Feature Phones)
ussd.desc: Dial a short code to contribute, check your balance, and receive your Credit Passport score.

credit_passport.title: Your savings history, finally visible to banks
credit_passport.desc: The Credit Passport is a score from 0 to 850 calculated from your real MoMo transaction history.
